TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version (7.35.20709.0) updated on machine:- KABDT001, KABDT002, KABRESRIGHT, KABFDBACK
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines (KABDT001, KABDT002, KABRESRIGHT, KABFDBACK) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.35.20709.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for - KABDT001
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines  KABDT001 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Version 11.5.2600.32.W Update for KSS Machines
TimeEntry.Notes:
Connected to the following machines and successfully updated Manage Engine version 11.5.2600.32.W:

  1. Machines Checked:
    • KABFDRIGHT
    • KABDT005
    • KABFDBACK
    • KABDT001
  2. Action Taken:
    • Version 11.5.2600.32.W was installed and updated on all listed machines.
    • Verified that all Manage Engine services are running correctly without errors post-update.
    • Confirmed proper functionality of the application on all devices post-installation.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.150 on KABDT004, KABFDRIGHT
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.146. Connected to the machines (KABDT004, KABFDRIGHT) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Server was down from past few days - KSS-HQ-VBR-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: The VBR server was down due to space issue from past few days so the backup were failed. Logged into esxi and then troubleshoot the issue on the VBR server to bring the VM up and running. After applying few fix on the VM the issue got resolved. Once the issue was resolved then turned on the VM and start taking the backups. The backup failed again due to space issue. Move some old backup files to one of the desktop as temporary location. After that start the backups again.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:- KABDT004 and KABFDRIGHT
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.5.2600.32.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (KABDT004 and KABFDRIGHT) from Manage Engine, Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for ISH-KSS:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the ISH-KSS:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Missing and failed patch update on the systems:- KABDT002, KABDT004
TimeEntry.Notes: Missing and failed patch update on the systems:- KABDT002, KABDT004

TimeEntry.Title: Monthly Switch Backup for KSS 172.16.32.253
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed KSS 172.16.32.253 switch using putty and performed configuration backup. placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network- config-Switch folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches- KABDT005, KABFDBACK, KSS-HQ-VBR-01, VMKABDC1.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the MYRMM portal and then worked on the following machine. Download and install all pending updates on the machine. After that verify all the machines are up and working fine.

KABDT005, KABFDBACK, KSS-HQ-VBR-01, VMKABDC1.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:- KABDT002,KABDT005 and KABDT003
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.5.2600.32.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine ( KABDT002,KABDT005 and KABDT003) from Manage Engine, Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.150 on :- KABRESLEFT, KABFDBACK
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.146. Connected to the machines through my rmm (KABRESLEFT, KABFDBACK) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.35.20709.0)updated on machines KABDT003,KABFDLEFT,KABFDRIGHT,KABRESLEFT
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines KABDT003,KABFDLEFT,KABFDRIGHT,KABRESLEFT
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.35.20709.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (v 26.1.25.9592) update:- KABDT001,KABDT002 and KABDT003
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found the machine KABDT001,KABDT002 and KABDT003 running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine .Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.25.9592. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latestversion of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (v 26.1.25.9592) update:- KABFDLEFT, KABFDRIGHT, KABRESLEFT, KABRESRIGHT
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found the machine KABFDLEFT, KABFDRIGHT, KABRESLEFT, KABRESRIGHT running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine .Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.25.9592. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latestversion of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for ISH-KSS:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the ISH-KSS:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on KSS-HQ-VBR-01, KABDT004, KABDT001, KABFDLEFT
TimeEntry.Notes: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on KSS-HQ-VBR-01, KABDT004, KABDT001, KABFDLEFT

TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.150. Connected to the machines through my rmm (KABDT002, KABDT005) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.162. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine .Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.25.9592. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latestversion of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162 on KABFDBACK,KABRESLEFT,KABFDRIGHT
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on is old version V0.14.150 Connected to the machines KABFDBACK,KABRESLEFT,KABFDRIGHT from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.162 After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for KSS Machine KABFDBACK and KABDT004
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines KABFDBACK and KABDT004 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: CrowdStrike Sensor Updated with Version 7.36.20805.0: KSS-HQ-VBR-01, VMKABDC1
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines KSS-HQ-VBR-01, VMKABDC1 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.36.20805.0 of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version (7.36.20805.0) updated on machine:- KABRESRIGHT, VMKABDC1
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines through my rmm (KABRESRIGHT, VMKABDC1) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.36.20805.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall backup for the KSS Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the KSS  Firewall, downloaded the backup file, and placed it in the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Umbrella Agent Syncing Issue with Portal for machines KABDT001,KABDT002,KABDT003,KABDT005
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the Cisco Umbrella portal and identified that machines KABDT001,KABDT002,KABDT003,KABDT005
 were experiencing syncing issues with the Cisco Umbrella portal. I then connected to the affected machines and addressed the network connectivity settings. After ensuring proper communication between the agent and the portal, the agent is now successfully syncing and communicating with the Cisco Umbrella cloud, with the correct status and configuration reflected in the portal.
